mean_en: a feeling of being extremely tired, usually because of hard work or exercise; (usually after another noun) a feeling of not wanting to do a particular activity any longer because you have done too much of it
sentence: Due to heavy fatigue, I keep falling asleep at the desk.
sentence_trans: 我很疲劳，所以直接趴桌上睡着了。
word_etyma: fat断裂 + ig做，驱动 + ue动词后缀 → fatigue快断裂的，接近极限点的 → fatigue疲乏，劳累
